# Arnaud Wiehe

> Official website of Arnaud Wiehe: AI governance, cybersecurity leadership, emerging technologies, speaking, books, and articles.

## Site
- Homepage: https://arnaudwiehe.com/
- Articles: https://arnaudwiehe.com/articles
- Books: https://arnaudwiehe.com/books
- Speaking: https://arnaudwiehe.com/speaking
- AI Assessment: https://arnaudwiehe.com/ai-assessment

## Author profile
- Name: Arnaud Wiehe
- Role: AI & Emerging Tech Strategist
- Focus: AI governance, cybersecurity leadership, digital risk, emerging technologies
